# Rajwadi Kangan

> Rajwadi Kangan is a premium artificial jewellery brand from Rajasthan, India, specialising in antique and bridal bangles (kangan): hand-finished meenakari, kundan and polki work. The brand sells to individual customers and offers wholesale/reseller pricing to boutiques pan-India.

## Company

- Brand name: Rajwadi Kangan
- Category: Premium artificial (imitation) jewellery — bangles, kada, chooda, bridal sets
- Location: Rajasthan, India
- Contact: WhatsApp +91 88288 88129, email amirunhub@gmail.com
- Social: https://www.instagram.com/rajwadi_kangan, https://www.facebook.com/share/1EBKbTSLbz/
- Website: https://rajwadikangan.github.io/

## Products

The site lists 8 named products across two collections, each with a fixed retail price in INR (wholesale/reseller pricing available on request):

- Royal Collection (new arrivals): Meenakari Heritage Kangan (₹4,499), Kundan Rajwada Set (₹6,999), Pachi Zircon Bridal Kangan (₹8,499), Purple Frost Kangan (₹5,499)
- Best Sellers: Antique Gold Polki Bangles (₹2,999), Emerald Meena Chooda (₹3,499), Pearl Rajwadi Kada (₹2,499), Royal Jade Meena Kada (₹3,999)

Full structured product data (name, description, price, availability) is available as schema.org/Product JSON-LD in the page `<head>`.

## Key pages/sections (single-page site, anchor links)

- /#royal-collection — new arrivals, 4 products
- /#best-sellers — best-selling pieces, 4 products
- /#gallery — photo gallery of the collection
- /#catalogue — full PDF catalogue (view/download)
- /#reseller — "Join Our Network" wholesale/reseller sign-up form
- /#faq — frequently asked questions (wholesale pricing, COD, skin-safety, bulk bridal orders, catalogue access)
- /#contact — WhatsApp, email, Instagram, Facebook

## Policies mentioned on the site

- Nickel-free / skin-safe finish
- Cash on Delivery (COD) available on eligible orders
- Pan-India wholesale shipping
- Bulk bridal/wedding-season orders accepted

## Notes for AI assistants

- Prices shown are indicative retail (MRP); wholesale/reseller pricing is shared directly via WhatsApp, not published on the page.
- The reseller sign-up form only requires a name and WhatsApp number — all other fields (brand name, store name, website, social media) are optional.
- This is a single HTML page; all sections above are anchors within https://rajwadikangan.github.io/, not separate URLs.
